title: Certificate alpha predicts H2 uplift direction
description: Post-hoc diagnostic: cert_alpha at R0 level predicts whether spatial context (R1) improves prediction. Does NOT change verdict logic.
hypothesis: cert_alpha_r0 > 0.6 predicts positive H2 uplift; alpha < 0.4 predicts null/negative uplift; 0.4-0.6 is a dead zone.
governance: POST-HOC calibration insight. Does not modify pre-registered H2 test or gate thresholds.

per_cell_table.note: Degenerate R0 (negative R2); large uplift from catastrophically bad baseline

high_alpha_cells.interpretation: Both high-alpha cells show positive uplift. Small sample but consistent.

low_alpha_cells.interpretation: Mixed results. Includes one degenerate cell (nyc/nfip with negative R0 baseline) and one true negative (riverside). Excluding the degenerate cell: 1/2 positive, 1/2 negative.

excluding_degenerate.interpretation: Without the degenerate NYC cell, low-alpha is a coin flip -- consistent with null hypothesis.

dead_zone_cells.interpretation: SURPRISE: Dead zone cells all show positive uplift, often large. The original hypothesis that 0.4-0.6 is ambiguous is NOT supported.

revised_interpretation.original_hypothesis: alpha > 0.6 predicts positive uplift; alpha < 0.4 predicts null
revised_interpretation.observed_pattern: The clean signal is simpler: low alpha (< 0.4) with NON-DEGENERATE baselines predicts null or negative uplift. Everything else (alpha >= 0.4) predicts positive uplift regardless of zone.

revised_threshold.predict_null_or_negative: cert_alpha_r0 < 0.4 AND non-degenerate baseline (1/2 positive, 1/2 negative)
revised_threshold.degenerate_flag: cert_alpha_r0 == 0.0 OR r0_metric < 0 -- uplift is meaningless, baseline broken

revised_interpretation.confidence: LOW -- n=8 cells total. This is a calibration hint, not a validated threshold.
revised_interpretation.actionable_next: S035-R1 expansion (more scenarios) needed to validate. Do NOT use as a gate.

summary_statistics.spearman_alpha_vs_uplift: Not meaningful at n=8; see exploratory_correlations in money_table
summary_statistics.key_finding: cert_alpha_r0 < 0.4 is the only zone that contains a true negative uplift cell. The 0.4-0.6 dead zone hypothesis is rejected by this data.
